Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to analyze the event log against the normative rules and desiderata Lets list each case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 1 sequence appears correct App Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Approved Inform Applicant Finalize Documentation Close Case No violations

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Desiderata Check timing Credit check same day 30 min later fine Inform applicant same day 2 hours after decision fine

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: No mention of follow up call so desideratum violation But its recommended but not required So case 1 fails desiderata on missing follow up call

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 2 sequence App Received 0800 then Risk Assessment 0820 before Credit Check 0900 violates normative order Credit Check must occur before Risk Assessment

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Also after Loan Decision Rejected they did Finalize Documentation 1000 which is not allowed after rejection So multiple normative violations

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: There is no Inform Applicant activity in the log

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After loan decision must inform applicant So missing Inform Applicant That is a strict rule So multiple violations

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 3 sequence App Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Approved Inform Applicant Finalize Documentation Close Case

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Check normative rules Order is correct Credit Check before Risk Assessment etc Loan approved then inform finalize close So no normative violations

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Credit Check Jan14 1000 49 hours later violation Inform Applicant Jan16 1500 about 51 hours after decision slightly over 48 violation Also no follow up call violation

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Normative violations Case 2 violates sequence Risk Assessment before Credit Check does not inform applicant and finalizes documentation after rejection No other cases violate normative rules

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Desiderata violations Case 1 missing follow up call but timing ok Case 2 missing follow up call credit check within 24h but order wrong inform applicant missing is normative not desiderata Case 3 credit check greater than 24h inform greater than 48h missing follow up call

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For case 2 it is a clear process violation perhaps due to error For case 3 delays might be due to workload or weekends Timing violations are mild Missing follow up call might be due to resource constraints
